---
title: "\'Conversation on the Mothers\' Union\' by the Editor"
---

## \'Conversation on the Mothers\' Union\' by the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (September 1887) 287-292

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
